title: Darkness in The Bottle
description: Adds potions and arrows with Darkness effect
body:
# Darkness in The Bottle
A simple Minecraft mod for Fabric that adds regular, splash and lingering potions and tipped arrows with Darkness effect.

Can be made in brewing stand by adding an echo shard to a potion of Night Vision.

![brewing_potion](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/syberiak.is-from.space/potion_of_darkness.gif)
